testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateTest

testcase.name: createGate registers a pending gate for a task
multiple gates for same workflow are independent
rejectGate transitions to REJECTED and unblocks waiter
approveGate transitions to APPROVED and unblocks waiter

testsuite.system-out: 09:05:06.391 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task summarize — 'Editorial review required' 09:05:06.392 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review A' 09:05:06.392 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-2 for workflow wf-1 task B — 'Review B' 09:05:06.392 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate APPROVED: gate-1 by reviewer — 'ok' 09:05:06.393 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review' 09:05:06.393 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-2 for workflow wf-2 task B — 'Review' 09:05:06.394 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review' agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review A' 09:05:06.395 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-2 for workflow wf-1 task B — 'Review B' 09:05:06.395 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate APPROVED: gate-1 by r1 — 'ok' 09:05:06.395 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate REJECTED: gate-2 by r2 — 'no' 09:05:06.396 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task summarize — 'Review' 09:05:06.396 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate REJECTED: gate-1 by editor-1 — 'Needs more detail' 09:05:06.396 [Test worker] INFO APPROVED: gate-1 by editor-1 — 'Looks good'
